keyEvents.text: Goal! Egypt 1, IR Iran 0. Mahmoud Saber (Egypt) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Trezeguet.
Penalty saved. Mehdi Taremi (IR Iran) right footed shot saved in the bottom right corner by Mostafa Shobeir (Egypt).
Delay in match because of an injury Mohamed Abdelmonem (Egypt).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Egypt 1, IR Iran 1. Ramin Rezaeian (IR Iran) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the bottom right corner.
Substitution, Egypt. Yasser Ibrahim replaces Mohamed Abdelmonem because of an injury.
Hossein Kanani (IR Iran) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Mahmoud Saber (Egypt) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Yasser Ibrahim (Egypt) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ali Nemati (IR Iran) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Egypt 1, IR Iran 1.
Substitution, IR Iran. Saleh Hardani replaces Hossein Kanani.
Substitution, Egypt. Marwan Attia replaces Mahmoud Saber.
Substitution, Egypt. Omar Marmoush replaces Emam Ashour.
Second Half begins Egypt 1, IR Iran 1.
Delay in match because of an injury Mostafa Zico (Egypt).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Egypt. Zizo replaces Mohamed Salah.
Substitution, IR Iran. Shahriyar Moghanloo replaces Saman Ghoddos.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Egypt. Hamza Abdelkarim replaces Mostafa Zico.
Saeid Ezatolahi (IR Iran) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Ahmed Fatouh (Egypt).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, IR Iran. Alireza Jahanbakhsh replaces Mohammad Mohebbi.
Mohanad Lasheen (Egypt) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Shoja Khalilzadeh (IR Iran) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.
Second Half ends, Egypt 1, IR Iran 1.
